content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.exonpublications.com/index.php/exon/article/view/intermittent-fasting-methods-health-benefits-risks", "source_title": "Intermittent Fasting Methods, Health Benefits, and Risks", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "DOI: https://doi.org/10.36255/intermittent-fasting-methods-health-benefits-risks Introduction Intermittent fasting has gained significant at...", "direct_quote": "DOI: https://doi.org/10.36255/intermittent-fasting-methods-health-benefits-risks Introduction Intermittent fasting has gained significant attention in recent years as a dietary strategy for weight management and overall health improvement.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Eat-Stop-Eat (ESE) The Eat-Stop-Eat method entails fasting for a full 24 hours once or twice a week.", "direct_quote": "Eat-Stop-Eat (ESE) The Eat-Stop-Eat method entails fasting for a full 24 hours once or twice a week.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The 16/8 Method The 16/8 method, also known as time-restricted feeding, involves fasting for 16 hours each day and consuming all daily calor...", "direct_quote": "The 16/8 Method The 16/8 method, also known as time-restricted feeding, involves fasting for 16 hours each day and consuming all daily calories within an 8-hour window.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
